transcript: Speaker A: मैं सभी को बताना चाहूंगी दोस्तों, मेरा बेटा का करतूत आज इसकी मदद से पकड़ा गया, ये देखो। ये कोचिंग बोलके कहां-कहां जाता है, आज मुझे सब पता लग गया। मैं तुम्हें गले... बाप रे! अच्छा, इसको घर आने दो। ये देखो, अगर आपको भी अपने बच्चों को ऐसे ही पकड़ना है ना, तो ये प्ले स्टोर पे जाओ और ये वाला ऐप डाउनलोड करो। इसको तो मैं बताती हूं। [I would like to tell everyone, friends, my son's misdeeds have been caught today with the help of this, look. Where he goes in the name of coaching, today I found out everything. 'I want to hold you...' Oh my god! Okay, let him come home. Look, if you also want to catch your kids like this, go to the Play Store and download this app. I will teach him a lesson.]
on_screen_text: Lalita Tution, Today you're coming na, We'll go together, Ofcourse lalita we'll have white sauce pasta my kuckli puckli noodles, I'm sending you my kisses, Awww babuuu, Catch na, Hugs to youuu my jaannn, Hahaha you naughty, I can't wait to hold you in my arms, Miss you Shona, Yessss loveee. Zinglish translation: तुम्हें गले लगाने के लिए इंतजार नहीं कर सकता [Can't wait to hug you]. Zinglish: English Speaking App, Capclock Market Places Pvt Ltd.
summary: A mother demonstrates how she used the Zinglish app's translation widget to read her son's English romantic chats in Hindi. She shows the translation feature in action on a chat screen and encourages parents to download the app from the Play Store to monitor their children.
